narrative:
Huber Heights 5-C (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,078 registered voters, with 63.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.3%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.7 percentage points.
